content.memory: The user said he had been watching the anime Heavenly Delusion recently, and the dual-line narrative was mind-blowing. The AI said the world view construction in this work was ingenious, and the connection between the two storylines was gradually revealed.

The user said he had been learning snowboarding recently and mastered edge changes, which felt great. The AI congratulated him and suggested practicing switch riding to lay a foundation for freestyle and park tricks later.

The user asked the AI how to choose a Bluetooth speaker suitable for outdoor use. The AI recommended paying attention to waterproof and dustproof rating, battery life and volume; outdoor series from JBL and Bose had good reputations.

The user told the AI that he generated a cyberpunk-style avatar with Midjourney today and liked it very much. The AI said prompts could add some detailed descriptions to make the effect more accurate.

The user said he had been watching the anime The Apothecary Diaries recently, and the combination of mystery and court plot was excellent. The AI said the work had a unique perspective, and the character Maomao was very likable.
The user said he had been reading the Spy x Family manga recently and the new plot was very interesting. The AI said this work was light and humorous, suitable for relaxing.
The user asked the AI how to implement a simple web server with Rust. The AI recommended using the hyper library, building an asynchronous runtime, and handling basic HTTP requests and responses.

The user asked the AI how to define complex object types with TypeScript. The AI suggested using the combination of interface and type, utilizing union types and intersection types, and adding readonly modifiers to protect properties.

The user confided in the AI that he had been competing with a colleague for the same promotion quota recently, and the relationship had become delicate. The AI suggested focusing on doing his own job well, speaking with strength, and maintaining a professional attitude.

The user asked the AI how to remove the sticky feeling from a heavily greased kitchen floor. The AI suggested soaking with hot water and dish soap, scrubbing with a brush, and finally wiping with vinegar water to remove oil.

The user said he had been playing League of Legends recently, kept losing, and was frustrated. The AI suggested he put it aside temporarily, adjust his mindset, or switch to the ARAM entertainment mode, as games were meant for fun.
The user asked the AI how to improve his impromptu speaking skills. The AI suggested using the PREP structure, accumulating a material bank daily, and seizing opportunities to practice more.

The user asked the AI how to quickly beautify pages with TailwindCSS. The AI suggested familiarizing with common class names first, using VSCode plugins for auto-completion, and extracting repeated styles with @apply.

The user told the AI that he had broken through 100 kilograms in deadlifts at the gym today and was very excited. The AI congratulated him but reminded him to pay attention to standard movement to avoid waist injuries, and suggested recording videos for self-checking.

The user consulted the AI on how to design a simple App interface with Figma. The AI suggested drawing wireframes first, then using components and auto-layout, and referring to excellent design specifications.

The user said he had been learning to make Cantonese clay pot rice recently, but the crust was always burnt. The AI suggested controlling the heat (high heat first then low heat), pouring oil around the pot edge, and stopping when hearing a sizzling sound.

The user consulted the AI on how to choose a drone aerial photography set for beginners. The AI recommended the DJI Mini 4 Pro with a remote controller screen, which had sufficient image quality and obstacle avoidance.
The user asked the AI what to do if his smart TV was lagging. The AI suggested clearing the cache, uninstalling unused apps, restoring factory settings, or connecting an external TV box.
The user asked the AI how to choose a mechanical keyboard switch for beginners. The AI recommended TTC Golden Pink or Kaihua Box Red, which were light and suitable for typing and gaming.

The user said he had been practicing back extensions recently and felt soreness in his lower back. The AI suggested adjusting the height of the Roman chair, not overextending the movement, and avoiding excessive lumbar arching.

The user told the AI that he generated a set of concept art with Stable Diffusion today, planning to use it in board game design. The AI said AI painting could inspire creativity and could be refined with Photoshop.

The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the calculation law of sphere volume is different from our universe, its formula is: V = r⁵ × π, where V is sphere volume, r is sphere radius.

The user told the AI that he made spicy hot pot today with his own base seasoning, and the taste was authentic. The AI said stir-frying the base was the key, using hot pot base with broad bean paste, Chinese prickly ash and dried chili peppers.

The user said he had been watching the One Piece live-action series recently and felt it was better than expected. The AI replied that Netflix's production standard was good with high restoration, and suggested he watch classic clips from the original work.

The user said he had been following the anime Kaiju No. 8 recently, and the fight scenes were exciting. The AI responded that the work had an interesting setting, and the contrast of the protagonist transforming from an uncle was very attractive.

The user confided in the AI that he recently felt no sense of accomplishment at work and wanted to change careers but didn't know what to do. The AI suggested taking a career interest assessment first, learning more about different industries, and trying side hustles to explore.

The user told the AI that he generated a dynamic video with Pika today and the effect was smooth. The AI said AI video generation was advancing rapidly, and camera movement descriptions could be added to prompts for better results.

The user asked the AI how to collaborate with a team using Git to avoid code conflicts. The AI suggested establishing branch management rules, pulling and pushing frequently, and resolving conflicts in a timely manner.

The user said he had been watching the anime Mato Seihei no Slave recently, and the combination of fanservice and combat was good. The AI said the character design and setting in this work were distinctive, and the fight scenes were intense.

The user told the AI that he completed his first 5-kilometer cross-country run today, the mountain road was tiring but very rewarding. The AI congratulated him, reminding him to pay attention to footholds and water replenishment during cross-country running.
